S.FORM: qci' blaq nya' iyal mquriq maniq qoli', kugih ka nyux pciriq squ tlnga', ukuw yapit qu qci' hiya'. .
S.PHON: qʦ~ʨiʔ βlaq njaʔ ijal mquriq maniq qoliʔ, kuɣiħ ka njux pʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu tlŋaʔ, ukuw japit qu qʦ~ʨiʔ ħijaʔ. .
S.FORM: qci' blaq nya' iyal mquriq maniq qoli', kugih ka nyux pciriq squ tlnga', ukuw yapit qu qci' hiya'. .
S.PHON: qʦ~ʨiʔ βlaq njaʔ ijal mquriq maniq qoliʔ, kuɣiħ ka njux pʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu tlŋaʔ, ukuw japit qu qʦ~ʨiʔ ħijaʔ. .
